commands.review_summary:
The branch allows self-scoped isolated cron runs to call `cron runs` only for their current job, adds regression tests/docs/changelog, and refreshes affected prompt snapshots.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main's self-remove guard rejects scoped `runs` before the existing job-id-scoped `cron.runs` handler can dispatch. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer-labeled PR with a permission-boundary change; no narrow repair is needed from ClawSweeper, so maintainer review and merge gating are the next actions.
